title: Betting on already-finished matches is possible
body: create_bet() has the match-finished check commented out, so users can create bets for games whose result is already known from the BBC results page.

title: Bet id collision when team names differ only by case
body: bet_id is built as f'{game_date}_{team1}_{team2}'.lower(), but the frontend form doesn't normalize casing before submitting, so two bets that only differ by capitalization silently overwrite each other in storage.

title: Wallet state not reset when the user switches accounts
body: WalletProvider.tsx keeps the previously connected address cached after switching accounts in the browser wallet extension, so useFootballBets.ts keeps fetching bets for the stale address until a full page reload.

title: Document required env vars for deployScript.ts
body: Running deploy/deployScript.ts fails with an unhelpful stack trace when the private key or RPC endpoint referenced from config/genlayer_config.py isn't set. Please validate inputs up front and document required env vars in the README.
